features: For combination skin, for blemished skin, for mature skin, vegan, without perfume, without alcohol, without parabens, microplastic particles free, nanoparticles free, gluten free, without acetone
We say no to animal testing. cosnova is listed internationally with essence and CATRICE both at PETA Germany and PETA
description: Product Description This make-up range with a very delicate mousse texture gives the face an even, naturally matte complexion and allows the skin to breathe freely. Ingredients silica Directions Apply a small amount of product to the skin using a makeup brush or sponge and blend in circular motions for an even finish., Use Within Recommended Period – Check jar symbol on package for months of use after opening., Use Within Recommended Period – Check jar symbol on package for months of use after opening.
